metadata.description: Managed-autonomy workflow for Claude Code: 11-step loop with audit/critique skills, agent-isolated reviewers, and project-config-driven ship pipeline.

plugins.name: flow
plugins.description: Managed-autonomy 11-step loop. Bundles the skeptical reviewers (auditor + plan-critic) with /flow:ship and the canonical workflow doc. PR 1 (v1.0.0) ships the restructure + audit/critique surface + /flow:ship; PR 2 backfills the rest of the workflow skill set and config schema.
